ksa_text: Author, maintain, and enforce enterprise data policies and procedures, ensuring alignment with privacy regulations, internal standards, and regulatory compliance requirements across the organization.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nice.top_element_label: Skill in integrating authorizations with requirements

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.
Skill in integrating authorizations with requirements

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.467) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.467). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: while the domain is relevant, this specific task KSA is better attributed to a more specialized adjacent role. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Initially included but overturned through adversarial review. Regulatory Compliance task KSA does not meet the quality or scope threshold for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant after cross-framework validation.
